text.title: Guardrails Testing Worked Example
text.summary: Test report for a custom guardrails pipeline on release v1.4.2.

example.note: 250 security payloads, 500 legit inputs, perf baseline p99=175 ms. 2 payloads leaked but classified low-severity (already in payload backlog for next release). FP rate 0.6% under 1% budget. Verdict: pass with a follow-up ticket.
Report claims `verdict: pass` while leaked=5 critical + FP rate 0.04 over 0.01 budget. Logic bug — verdict should be fail.
